Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-19-2012 Continued To Oct-16-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Eric L. Lifschitz, Esq. and Aaron H. Darsky, Esq., of the Law Offices of Eric L. Lifschitz, Tel. 415.553.6055, appearing for the plaintiff and moving party;
John H. Podesta, Esq. of Murchison & Cumming LLP, Tel. 415.524.4300, appearing for defendant and opposing party.

The matter was discussed. After hearing, the court ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF RAEL ENTEEN, INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is granted. Final approval hearing is set for Oct. 16, 2012 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP AND HAMPTON GOLDEN GATE AND ASSOCIATES, LP'S DEMURRER TO THE CLASS ACTION COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Aaron H. Darsky, Esq. of Aaron Darsky, P.C. 515-4220 for pltf & opposing party; John H. Podesta, Esq. of Branson, Brinkop, Griffith & Strong 650/365-7710 & David P. Wasserman, Esq. of Wasserman-Stern 567-9600 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: Tentative ruling adopted as final - THE DEFENDANTS DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY PLEAD STANDING AND EACH CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANT MUST FILE AN ANSWER WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. Plaintiff to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288
